builds.name: 20 Pop Scouts
builds.summary: Example custom build order imported by the dashboard.

steps.title: Sheep
steps.instruction: 6 villagers on sheep and keep villager production constant.

steps.title: Wood
steps.instruction: Villagers 7-10 to wood and build a lumber camp.

steps.title: Berries
steps.instruction: Villagers 14-17 to berries and build a mill.

steps.title: Second boar
steps.instruction: Lure second boar and keep food under the town center.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Click Feudal Age, build barracks during uptime, then add stable.
